content:
# Equivalent Circulation Distance

**Summary**: The total pressure of the drilling fluid in the wellbore during circulation.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-murif|Murif, 2023]] monitored equivalent-circulation-distance to ensure it stays within safe limits.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-murif|Murif, 2023]] Crucial for preventing formation damage and wellbore instability.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-murif|Murif, 2023]] Measured via PWD tools or predicted using ECDeffc.m.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The ECDeffc.m model predicted an ECD of 69.8 PCF at a depth of X3000 ft, which was close to the measured value of 68 PCF. ([[2023-murif|Murif, 2023, p. 194]])
